bullish: Higher highs and higher lows on the 4H
bearish: Lower highs and lower lows on the 4H
neutral: Price is chopping between the 50 and 200 EMA

risk_rules: Never risk more than 1% of your account per trade
Only take trades with at least 1:2 risk to reward
If you have 2 losing trades in a row, stop for the day
notes: Beginner setup. Focus on learning, not overtrading. Check the morning brief before every session.
